Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Payment Handled in cases that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled in process variants that contain at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total time between Request Payment and Payment Handled grouped by whether the case previously experienced Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Payment Handled in variants without any rejection versus variants with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time it takes Payment Handled to be done after Request Payment in cases that looped back due to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Payment Handled compared to time from Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER (followed by resubmission) to Payment Handled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Payment Handled in the variant Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE -> Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER -> Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE -> Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE -> Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER -> Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR -> Request Payment -> Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average waiting time to Payment Handled after Request Payment in cases that originated from a domestic trip (inferred from absence of pre-approval steps) versus those requiring pre-approval
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Payment Handled in cases where the budget owner and supervisor are the same person (shorter approval path) versus cases involving PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Payment Handled in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER, measured from the first submission to final completion
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Payment Handled versus average time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and eventual Payment Handled (including rework)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time from Request Payment to Payment Handled in high-frequency successful variants (e.g., without rejections) compared to low-frequency variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time until Payment Handled in cases that were submitted within two months after the trip (standard reimbursement window) versus those submitted later, especially if they involved PRE_APPROVER rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time for Payment Handled following a direct approval path (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled) versus paths involving PRE_APPROVER approval or rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Elapsed time between the first occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Payment Handled in cases with multiple rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'
